examples: He stopped talking and looked curiously at the old chinaberry.
He stopped talking and looked curiously at the old chinaberry. He walked up to it, placed both hands on the bark and closed his eyes for a moment.
A bolt struck a tall chinaberry tree at the edge of the field. It filled all visible space with a blinding glare and the crash seemed to invade the very boards they stood upon.
That the moon looks good through the limbs of the chinaberry tree?
